creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Follow the migration of net/rrdtool to databases/rrdtool

Fix: 

Repocopies:
	net/py-rrdtool_lgpl/	-> databases/py-rrdtool_lgpl

Change categories:
	net python		-> databases python

Affected ports:
	net-mgmt/nav

I volunteer to do the changes in the above mentioned ports.
